mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lecture ( member_id, member_name, major_id, semester, `name`, credit, `type`, ref_books, goal, weekly_plan, academic_year, max_std, start_date, end_date, room_id ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, (SELECT name FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}), (SELECT major_id FROM major WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{majorName}, '%') LIMIT 1), #{semester}, #{name}, #{credit}, #{type}, #{refBooks}, #{goal}, #{weeklyPlan}, #{academicYear}, #{maxStd}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{roomId} )
mapper.select: select l.status, l.lectureType, l.lectureName, l.proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week, lr.building, l.targetGrade,l.maxStd, l.is_open from lecture l left join lecture_schedule ls on l.lecture_id=ls.lecture_id left join lecture_room lr on ls.room_id=lr.room_id where l.status = 'before'
